old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-zyit","title":"Zephyr linker section duplication in puck vs coap subsys CMake","description":"Review of changes moving zephyr_linker_sources() to top-level in lichen/apps/puck/CMakeLists.txt:11 and unconditional zephyr_iterable_section(coap_resource_lichen_coap_server) + sections-ram.ld addition (now defines both sections).
